title: Missing Evidence Procurement Queue
principle: Inversion Principle — procure only evidence that cannot be safely inferred; documentation tiers are purchased when a downstream node requires EXACT_CONFIGURATION_MATCH evidence.

orthogonality.MISN: research directive to close gaps / acquire sources
orthogonality.AJR: purchase clearance for a specific AID asset
orthogonality.MEPQ: ranked evidence procurement items that cannot be inferred — links KG+MISN+SRC without inventing values

forbidden: Invented torque / pinout / CG / mass / hole diameters
False confidence tiers (e.g. LEVEL_4_DOCUMENTED_OEM without hashed OEM bytes + token anchors)
Treating indexed URLs as acquired evidence

items.focus: Cab-to-engine / firewall LV connector + CAN architecture (EWD)

selected_next_deployment.title: Low-Voltage Gateway Interconnect discovery (EWD prep)
selected_next_deployment.rationale: MEPQ-003 is critical and already gated on commercial EWD (MISN-000003). Option B maps open questions without inventing pinouts. Option A (ICE deconstruction) stays deferred with MEPQ-001/002 registered only.
